session.user: Run prettier --check on the following 4 files and report results: - docs/learned/planning/planned-pr-context-local-preprocessing.md - docs/learned/planning/learn-without-pr-context.md - docs/learned/planning/learn-pipeline-workflow.md - docs/learned/cli/learn-command-conditional-pipeline.md

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Check Prettier formatting on 4 documentation files

session.tool_result: Checking formatting... All matched files use Prettier code style!

prettier passed: All 4 files use Prettier code style
